# Sada (ШөШҜЩү) вҖ” editorial audio & video media-platform UI kit

> A warm, Arabic-first publishing kit: cream paper, ink-black type, a hot-orange
> accent and a mustard "subscribe" gold. IBM Plex Sans Arabic for UI, the Thmanyah
> Sans/Serif display faces for headings. Full RTL + dark mode. Built for podcasts,
> documentaries, newsletters and longreads вҖ” dense editorial card grids, no stock photos.

This file is **agent-readable**: it is enough to reproduce the design. Pair it with
`design/tokens.json` (machine-readable tokens) and `uikit.json` (the surface manifest).

## Mood
Editorial newsroom meets podcast network. Calm cream background, confident black
display type, one loud orange for links/CTAs and a gold accent kept only for the
subscribe action. Podcast/newsletter art is **typographic** вҖ” the show name set big on
a tinted colour ground (see `components/cover.tsx` + `lib/tones.ts`).

## Fonts (self-hosted, `react/public/fonts/`, declared in `design/fonts.css`)
| Role            | Family                  | Weights            | Use                          |
|-----------------|-------------------------|--------------------|------------------------------|
| `--font-sans`   | IBM Plex Sans Arabic    | 300/400/500/600/700| UI, body, captions           |
| `--font-display`| Thmanyah Sans           | 300/400/500/700/900| headings, wordmark, covers   |
| `--font-serif`  | Thmanyah Serif          | 400/700/900        | editorial showpiece headings |

Thmanyah faces are distributed publicly at font.thmanyah.com; IBM Plex Sans Arabic is
open source (OFL). All are bundled as woff2 and served from `/fonts/*`.

## Color вҖ” light (default)
| Token                  | Value     |
|------------------------|-----------|
| background             | `#f6f4ee` |
| foreground             | `#15110c` |
| card                   | `#ffffff` |
| muted                  | `#ece8df` |
| muted-foreground       | `#6f675b` |
| border                 | `#e2ddd2` |
| primary (ink buttons)  | `#15110c` |
| primary-foreground     | `#f6f4ee` |
| accent (links/CTA)     | `#fa541c` |
| ink (dark sections)    | `#15110c` |
| ink-foreground         | `#f4efe6` |
| gold (subscribe)       | `#e3b23c` |
| success                | `#2f9e44` |

## Color вҖ” dark (`.dark`)
| Token            | Value     |
|------------------|-----------|
| background       | `#14110c` |
| foreground       | `#f4efe6` |
| card             | `#1d1813` |
| muted            | `#261f17` |
| muted-foreground | `#a89e8f` |
| border           | `#322a20` |
| primary          | `#f4efe6` |
| accent           | `#fd6f3a` |
| ink              | `#0c0a07` |

## Brand scale (orange)
`50 #fff3ed В· 100 #ffe2d3 В· 200 #ffc2a6 В· 300 #ff9a6f В· 400 #fd6f3a В· 500 #fa541c В·
600 #e23d0a В· 700 #b62f09 В· 800 #8f2710 В· 900 #74230f`

## Cover tones (`lib/tones.ts`)
`ink В· gold В· green В· darkgreen В· cream В· sand В· card В· mint В· pink В· orange В· lime В· redink`
вҖ” each a bg/fg pair used for typographic show art.

## Radius & shadow
`sm .5rem В· md/DEFAULT .75rem В· lg 1.25rem В· xl 1.75rem В· 2xl 2.25rem`.
`--shadow-card` (subtle lift) and `--shadow-pop` (overlays). Buttons are full pills.

## Components (`react/src/components/`)
- **Button** вҖ” variants `primary В· accent В· gold В· ink В· outline В· ghost В· link`;
  sizes `sm В· md В· lg В· icon`; hover/active/focus-ring/disabled.
- **Badge** вҖ” `neutral В· accent В· soft В· gold В· ink В· success В· outline`.
- **Input** вҖ” pill text field, focus вҶ’ primary border.
- **Card** + `CardHeader/Title/Description/Content`.
- **Container** вҖ” centered max-w-6xl page gutter.
- **Cover** вҖ” typographic show/newsletter art (square or 16:9, tone + optional corner badge).

## Blocks (`react/src/blocks/`)
- **Wordmark** вҖ” the "ШөШҜЩү / Sada" logotype (orange diacritic dot + display face).
- **SectionHeader** вҖ” icon + title with a "more вҶ’" link (RTL-aware arrow).
- **Footer** вҖ” ink footer: wordmark, tagline, Explore/Company/Legal columns.

## Pages (`react/src/routes/`)
- **Home `/`** вҖ” ink promo hero with a colour-tile grid; featured lead + side stories;
  "New episodes" cover grid + feature rows; "Featured newsletters" tile row;
  "New documentaries" 16:9 cards; "New articles" two-column list; ink footer.
- **Articles `/articles`** вҖ” category filter chips + a fuller article list.
- **Podcasts `/podcasts`** вҖ” a feature show banner + a show grid with play affordances.
- **Components `/components`** вҖ” the design system: swatches, brand scale, type scale,
  the three fonts, every Button/Badge/Input variant, and the cover tones.

## Tech
React 19 + Vite + react-router, Tailwind v4 (`@theme` in `design/theme.css`),
class-variance-authority, lucide-react icons. EN + AR via a small i18n provider that
flips `dir`/`lang`; dark mode via a `.dark` class on `<html>`.

## Reproduce
```bash
cd react && pnpm install && pnpm dev   # http://localhost:5173
npx uikit-studio validate              # repo root вҶ’ "Sada v1.0.0 В· react"
```
All content in `react/src/i18n/*` is original placeholder copy вҖ” invent your own; keep
the tokens, fonts, and component language.

Gallery: <https://uikit.studio> В· Submit: <https://uikit.studio/submit>
